summary: Full E2E testing of Thrumline marketing site — backend Fit API + all 7 frontend pages + consent architecture + FAQPage JSON-LD exact-match. All critical flows PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: broad `except Exception` swallows Pydantic/DB errors as 500 (currently harmless because validation happens before). Consider narrowing.
GET /api/fit/submissions is unauthenticated — acceptable per code comment (build-time verification only), but note this before production.
seed_data_creation: Two TEST_ prefixed Fit submissions inserted into mongo fit_submissions collection during testing (via API and UI). Safe to leave; prefixed for identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nav link data-testids follow pattern nav-link-home, nav-link-what-we-do, nav-link-how-it-works, nav-link-signals (NOT nav-link-/path). Signals JSON-LD FAQPage schema is injected via useSeo hook and mainEntity[0/1] .name + .acceptedAnswer.text EXACTLY match the visible DOM strings — verified. Consent banner uses localStorage key 'thrumline_consent_v1' with shape {v:1, ga, clarity, ts, origin}. Fit form POST /api/fit/submit returns 200 with full submission payload. Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. Home canonical correctly points to https://thrumline.com/ (production domain).
verified_features: Home hero animated SVG logo present with SMIL <animate> tags
Kinetic tagline 'The sound of your message connecting...' present
Nav: 4 links + CTA route correctly; nav-cta-fit routes to /fit
/what-we-do: 5 offerings + 2 differentiators (Senior hands, Bill you can read)
/signals: 2 signals + FAQPage JSON-LD mainEntity length=2 with EXACT-MATCH question/answer text to DOM
/fit: form submits successfully → fit-success shown; backend returns 200+id
Consent banner: 3 buttons; Accept writes ga:true,clarity:true; Decline writes ga:false,clarity:false
Footer cookie prefs modal opens with toggle-ga, toggle-clarity, cookie-prefs-save
Canonical URLs point to https://thrumline.com<path>; titles + descriptions populated
Backend validation: missing email → 422, invalid email → 422, missing name → 422
